message:
feat: Complete event streaming infrastructure, enhance CLI tooling, and improve UI experience

## Event Streaming & Job Management
- Add comprehensive event tracking to JobManager with event logs and sequences
- Implement `/jobs/{id}/events` endpoint with proper NDJSON streaming
- Add `get_events()` method supporting time-based filtering with `since` parameter
- Track event sequences for ordered replay and debugging
- Simplify JobSnapshot by removing duplicate webhook registration schema

## CLI Enhancements (scripts/mdwb_cli.py)
- Add dual `events` commands: streaming mode and polling mode with cursor tracking
- Implement `_stream_events()` for real-time NDJSON consumption
- Add `_poll_snapshots()` fallback with configurable intervals
- Enhance event cursor extraction from NDJSON lines
- Add `--since` parameter for incremental event polling
- Support `--follow` mode for continuous event monitoring
- Improve `watch` command with `/jobs/{id}/events` integration
- Fix `time.sleep()` usage (replacing incorrect `typer.sleep()`)

## UI Improvements (web/)
- Add comprehensive job state management in Alpine.js
- Implement real-time SSE event processing for all event types
- Add "Run Capture" button that POSTs to `/jobs` and auto-connects SSE stream
- Store job ID after creation and wire panels to `/jobs/{id}` endpoints
- Add fallback to demo stream when no active job exists
- Enhance event parsing with proper JSON handling for complex payloads
- Add Tailwind styles for warning pills and state badges

## API Refinements (app/main.py)
- Streamline `/jobs/{id}/events` to return stored events with filtering
- Add `_parse_since()` helper for ISO timestamp parsing
- Remove webhook registration endpoint (deferred to future iteration)
- Simplify JobManager initialization without webhook sender
- Clean up duplicate event emission logic

## Test Coverage (tests/test_job_manager.py)
- Add test for event history retrieval
- Add test for time-based event filtering
- Verify event sequences are properly tracked
- Ensure state transitions are recorded in event log

## Configuration & Settings
- Add `WEBHOOK_SECRET` to `.env.example` for future webhook support
- Add webhook_secret property to Settings dataclass
- Document event streaming in ops.md
- Update PLAN with progress on events/webhook implementation

## Bug Fixes
- Fix duplicate artifacts field in JobSnapshot TypedDict
- Ensure all snapshot returns are defensive copies
- Fix event parsing in CLI to handle both SSE and NDJSON formats
- Correct time import usage in CLI polling logic

## Documentation
- Update ops.md with `/jobs/{id}/events` usage patterns
- Document CLI `events` command with follow/since options
- Update PLAN progress notes for event streaming completion
- Add bead progress tracking for bo2 (event hardening)

This commit completes the event streaming infrastructure, enabling external systems to consume job events via NDJSON feeds. The CLI now supports both real-time streaming and cursor-based polling, while the UI automatically connects to live job streams after creation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
